summary: A war-movie-style year-end hype montage recapping ICE's enforcement year: an armored BearCat tactical truck in the snow, fully kitted SWAT/BORTAC-style operators staging inside a vehicle, agents breaching doorways, and bold red statistic title cards ('1,000+ SIGNED PARTNERSHIPS WITH LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT'), ending on a glamour close-up of an HSI badge beside a pistol. The tweet frames it as 'ICE had a busy year, but the work is just getting started,' selling momentum and machismo. It is clearly produced youth-appeal spectacle: cinematic tactical imagery, animated stat cards, dramatic scoring, and trailer-like pacing.

script.scene: A dark-green armored BearCat tactical vehicle drives across a snowy, fenced compound under gray skies.
Low-angle shot of geared-up operators' legs and rifles; bold red animated stat overlay '1,000+' with 'SIGNED PARTNERSHIPS WITH LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT.'
Interior of an armored vehicle packed with camo-clad, masked tactical agents (one vest reads 'BORTAC') holding rifles, ready to deploy.
Agent in 'POLICE / Homeland Security Investigations' vest breaches and moves through an interior doorway during a raid.
Cinematic macro close-up of a gold HSI/federal agent badge lying beside a holstered/black pistol.

notable_text: SIGNED PARTNERSHIPS WITH LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT
ICE had a busy year, but the work is just getting started.
